EXPLANATION: This is a foundational, well-known paper in social choice theory by Allan Gibbard, published in Econometrica in 1973. The cited reference is accurate.

LINK: https://www.econometricsociety.org/publications/econometrica/1973/07/01/manipulation-voting-schemes-general-result
FOUND_TITLE: Manipulation of Voting Schemes: A General Result
FOUND_AUTHORS: Allan Gibbard
FOUND_YEAR: 1973
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
